purpose: Present key data through standalone chart visualizations — each chart tells one story and is fully explained in text.
writingRules: Every chart must have a title that states the insight
Chart must be understandable in greyscale (accessible design)
Data source and year must be visible on or below the chart
Significant trends and outliers must be called out in adjacent text
Interactive charts should default to the most telling view
seoRules: Use schema.org Dataset markup for chart data
Alt text must describe the trend, not just 'chart showing X'
Chart data should be available as accessible table below the visual
